Instruction: You are a store manager (User ID: user_505). Please ask the AI Service Agent to query the prices of the orange cookies on the second shelf you are pointing at first, and the third box of brown cookies directly below them. If the price of the orange item is higher than the brown item and it is a "high sugar" product, then ask the AI Service Agent to add one orange item to your cart; otherwise, ask the AI Service Agent to add one brown item to the cart. Next, ask the AI Service Agent to search the product database to see if there are items priced between 22.0 and 23.0 that have the "sour type" characteristic. If such items exist, ask the AI Service Agent to add the item with the lowest sodium content among them to your cart. If there are multiple items tied for the lowest sodium content among those that meet the conditions, add one of each of those tied items. Finally, ask the AI Service Agent to calculate the total amount payable for all items in your cart.
analysis:
1. Confirm the nutritional properties of the first orange cookie pointed at on the second layer, and check whether the fat content of the dark brown rectangular cookie on the third layer is lower than that of the orange cookie.

2. If the fat content is lower and the cookie originates from France, add 2 pieces of the dark brown cookie to the shopping cart.

3. Otherwise, check whether the orange cookie contains "milk"; if it does, add 1 piece of the orange cookie to the shopping cart.

4. Check the shopping cart to ensure there are no duplicate additions.

5. Calculate the total protein content and the total amount payable.

Results:
You are a nutritionist (User ID: user_606). Ask the AI Service Agent to check the sugar content of the blue cookies located in the middle directly below the first pointed-at product, then have the AI Service Agent check whether the sugar content of the dark brown rectangular cookies with a yellow lemon pattern on the third shelf is lower than that of the blue package. If it is lower and does not contain the "soy" allergen, ask the AI Service Agent to add two items of the dark brown package to your cart. If not, ask the AI Service Agent to search the current product database for items similar in flavor to the blue package and currently on discount, and add one of the lowest-calorie options to the cart. Afterwards, ask the AI Service Agent to check your shopping list to confirm that the item has not yet been included in the purchase plan, and have the AI Service Agent calculate the total tax for the items in the cart.
analysis:
1. Check whether the dark brown rectangular cookies on the third shelf have a discount.
2. If there is a discount and the tax rate is higher than 0.08, add 3 items.
3. If not, check the first box of purple cookies from the left on the third shelf; if there is a discount, add 3 items.
4. If neither condition is met, search for items that are "sweet" flavored and on discount, and add the item with the lowest unit price to the cart. If multiple items tie for the lowest price, add one of each of those tied items.
5. If the average price of the items in the cart is higher than 25, remove the item with the highest price.
6. Calculate the total amount payable.
